description_long: This is a tall, slender wine bottle with a dark brown glass body and a long, narrow neck. The bottle is sealed with a light tan closure, likely a cork, and is partially covered by a matching tan or beige capsule. The front of the bottle features a large, rectangular label with a prominent 'J' in gold and white, accompanied by smaller text and a crest or emblem. The label wraps partially around the bottle, with additional text and details visible on the back label. The overall design is elegant and classic, suitable for a premium wine, and the bottle's surface appears smooth and glossy.
description: A tall, dark brown wine bottle with a tan closure and elegant gold-and-white labeling, featuring a prominent 'J' and crest.
description_view_0: The bottle is seen at a slight angle, showing the side of the main label with the large 'J' and part of the white label wrapping around.
description_view_1: This is the front view, displaying the full main label with the 'J', crest, and detailed text most clearly.
description_view_2: The bottle is rotated to show more of the side and back, revealing the edge of the main label and the start of the back label.
description_view_3: The back of the bottle is visible, showing a white label with fine print and barcode, typical for wine bottles.
attribute_label_or_branding: The bottle features a large, rectangular front label with a gold 'J' on a white and gold background, a crest or emblem, and additional text. The back label is white with fine print and a barcode. The labels are rectangular and wrap partially around the bottle.
attribute_bottle_neck_shape: Long, narrow, and straight neck with a gentle taper toward the top and a slight flare at the lip.
